news-global-econ.title: 5 dangerous cruise ports that travelers should research before booking excursions
news-global-econ.description: Popular cruise destinations such as Belize, Haiti and Jamaica carry U.S. State Department travel advisories that passengers should review before going ashore.

news-global-econ.description:

news-global-econ.title: Art heist targeting million-dollar masterpieces exposes blind spots in museum defenses, expert warns
news-global-econ.description: Former FBI agent Geoff Kelly says museum art thefts are more common than people think, warning that open, welcoming spaces also create security vulnerabilities.

news-korea-soc.title: Humanoid robot shows speed and real skill
news-korea-soc.description: KAIST's humanoid robot sprints, moonwalks and kicks a ball on a soccer field, showing smooth repeatable movement powered by custom motors and AI.

news-korea-soc.title: Ex-NATO ambassador warns US and allies must 'stop the sniping' and unite to end Iran conflict
news-korea-soc.description: Former U.S. Amb. to NATO Kurt Volker said the United States and its allies must "stop the sniping" and work together to end the conflict with Iran on "Fox News Live."

news-global-soc.title: WNBA legend Sue Bird says IOC's new policy to protect women's sports is akin to 'fearmongering'
news-global-soc.description: Basketball Hall of Famer Sue Bird said in a podcast the IOC's new policy on transgender athletes in women's sports is rooted in "fearmongering," not protection.

news-global-soc.description:
